meta.title: Complete Setup | NexGen
meta.description: Fill in your details, choose a payment method, and be set up in 30 minutes.

pageSubtitle: Fill in the details below and choose a payment method. Installation begins within 30 minutes of payment confirmation.

form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
form.botTokenError: Token format should be: numbers:alphanumeric string
form.userIdError: User ID should be at least 5 digits
form.submitHint: After submitting, choose a payment method. Credit card payments trigger instant installation.

botToken.title: How to get your Bot Token:
botToken.step1: Search for BotFather on Telegram (look for the blue checkmark ✓)
botToken.step3: Set a display name and username for your bot (username must end with bot)
botToken.step4: BotFather will send you a Token like 123456789:ABCdef...
botToken.step5: Copy the entire Token and paste it here

userId.title: How to get your User ID:
userId.step3: It will reply with your User ID (a number)
userId.step4: Copy that number and paste it here

payment.choosePayment: Choose a payment method to complete your order:
payment.paymeInstruction: Please use the following PayMe link to pay:
payment.paymeEmailHint: After payment, please send a confirmation email so we can arrange installation:
payment.cardNote: Installation begins automatically after credit card payment (as fast as 30 min).
payment.paymeNote: PayMe payments require manual confirmation; installation may take longer.

email.subject: NexGen PayMe Payment Confirmation — {{plan}}
email.bodyConfirm: Please reply to this email to confirm receipt and arrange installation.

help.botGuideHint: Need help creating a Telegram Bot?
